runTitle: Diagnose which condition blocks a sample transaction
forbidOnly: Only forbid (block) policies can be diagnosed
notDiagnosable: Cannot diagnose — the policy contains hole/raw blocks
noSample: No sample for this action ({{action}}) — cannot diagnose
guardOnly: The block came from a field-presence check (guard)
unevaluable: Some conditions cannot be evaluated with this context (enrichment fields not provided — {{n}} yellow dashed)
noBlockSample: This sample transaction was not blocked
parseError: Cannot parse the policy, so the diagram cannot be drawn
